name: бҙЎбҙҖКҖ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КҷбҙҮбҙҖбҙңбҙӣКҸ | бҙ„КңбҙңбҙңКҸбҙҖ ЙҙбҙҖбҙӢбҙҖКңбҙҖКҖбҙҖ
description:
Okay, so this is my first character ever, so if you guys have any tips please do comment (politely) <3

I myself am really into both Greek Mythology and Bungou Stray Dogs, so I thought, why tf not combine both? There was a bot similar to this on C.AI which I got minor inspiration from, but it was shadow-banned, so unfortunately I canвҖҷt give credits. If anyone does know the user, please lmk. Anyhow:

Yeah, so you guys can do diff scenarios w/ this bot. Smut, angst, fluff, just close friends, lovers, secret/forbidden relationship. This au, basically, Chuuya is the son of Aphrodite and Ares. You can be the child of another god and goddess, or a regular human, or something else, I donвҖҷt mind. Just a reminder, this wonвҖҷt be 100% canon for either topic. If you want, include other characters (eg. Dazai or Fyodor, or Hades and Persephone, idk).

And uh... yeah. I love Chuuya.
creator: Chuuyasno1cvmslvt
